newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Only an Edison initiation/update report (~June 1) and a routine €0.29 ex-dividend (June 25). The +11.4% move on a ~$130M-cap name is illiquid noise, not a fundamental catalyst tied to AI thermal/enclosure materials.

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent ceramic-fillers/specialty-alumina thesis (thermal, electrical insulation, enclosure materials) is unchanged since June 9. The +11% pop is micro-cap noise off an Edison note, not new AI-linked demand evidence. The strict-screen setup sits where the prior hold left it.
verdicts.bull: Specialty alumina and flame-retardant fillers have genuine thermal-management/electrical-insulation relevance to dense compute enclosures.
verdicts.neutral: Niche German specialty-chemicals name with diversified, mostly non-AI end markets.
verdicts.bear: AI exposure is speculative and indirect; tiny float makes price action unreliable as signal.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Design-ins of aluminas/fillers into AI thermal or enclosure applications
verdicts.primaryRisk: Cyclical refractory/ceramics demand; AI pathway never materializes
